title: lebeckia cuspidosa
intro: Lebeckia cuspidosa, also known as the yellow shrub, is a small to medium-sized shrub native to the southwestern parts of Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Lebeckia cuspidosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can be dried or fresh to be used in traditional medicine.
